title: FontPairing
description: A single entry in the fontfetch community font-pairing registry.

url.description: Canonical URL where the fonts are observable

submitter.description: GitHub handle of the submitter (optional, for credit)

screenshot.description: URL of a screenshot (GitHub user-images URL or a path under pairings/screenshots/)

family.description: Font family name as it appears in the site CSS

role.description: How the font is used, e.g. 'headlines', 'body', 'code', 'ui'

foundry.description: Designer or foundry, e.g. 'Klim Type Foundry'

license.description: 'open' = OFL or similar free-redistribution license; 'commercial' = needs a paid license; 'unknown' = couldn't determine

free_alternatives.description: Open-source substitutes that look similar — the most useful field in the registry

notes.description: Anything worth knowing about the pairing — context, variants, history

source.description: How the font was identified, e.g. 'DevTools inspection on 2026-05-27', 'designer interview'
